title: Use local civil double-hour or true solar time

positions.summary: Validate the IANA local civil time and map its civil hour to the project's 13 double-hour indices.
Correct the calculation clock using longitude and NOAA's approximate equation of time before selecting a double hour.

sources.locator: General Solar Position Calculations, true solar time equations

default_policy.rationale: Civil time remains the compatibility default; apparent solar time is available only when explicitly selected with longitude.

user_disclosure: Civil time is the default. Apparent solar time uses the documented NOAA approximation only when explicitly selected with longitude.

sources.locator: General Solar Position Calculations, true solar time equations
